package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for repository_single_record_write_without_rows_affected_check: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Single-record-oriented repository updates or deletes that never inspect `RowsAffected` or an equivalent write-outcome signal.
type CaseRepositorySingleRecordWriteWithoutRowsAffectedCheckDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRepositorySingleRecordWriteWithoutRowsAffectedCheckModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRepositorySingleRecordWriteWithoutRowsAffectedCheckRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRepositorySingleRecordWriteWithoutRowsAffectedCheckModel
}

type CaseRepositorySingleRecordWriteWithoutRowsAffectedCheckService struct {
    repo *CaseRepositorySingleRecordWriteWithoutRowsAffectedCheckRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRepositorySingleRecordWriteWithoutRowsAffectedCheckAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeRepositorySingleRecordWriteWithoutRowsAffectedCheck(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRepositorySingleRecordWriteWithoutRowsAffectedCheckDTO) error {
    focus := "repository_single_record_write_without"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseRepositorySingleRecordWriteWithoutRowsAffectedCheckRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseRepositorySingleRecordWriteWithoutRowsAffectedCheckModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    repository_single_record_write_rows_negative := map[string]int{"repository": 1, "single": 2, "record": 3, "write": 4, "rows": 5, "affected": 6}
    repository_single_record_write_rows_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    repository_negative_0 := db.Where("repository_id = ?", input)
    _ = repository_negative_0
    single_negative_1 := repository_single_record_write_rows_negative["single"] + len(input)
    _ = single_negative_1
    record_negative_2 := repository_single_record_write_rows_negative["record"] + len(input)
    _ = record_negative_2
    write_negative_3 := repository_single_record_write_rows_negative["write"] + len(input)
    _ = write_negative_3
    rows_negative_4 := repository_single_record_write_rows_negative["rows"] + len(input)
    _ = rows_negative_4
    affected_negative_5 := repository_single_record_write_rows_negative["affected"] + len(input)
    _ = affected_negative_5
    return nil
}
